questions.question: What is the recommended way to trigger a network request from a button click handler in Nuxt?
options: fetch() from the browser Fetch API

questions.question: How can you get the reactive loading/error state of useFetch without it firing immediately?
options: Pass lazy: true and call refresh() later
Pass immediate: false and call execute() later
Pass server: false and wait for mount

questions.question: Why does calling useFetch inside an event handler break its functionality?
options: Event handlers run in a different JavaScript thread
useFetch requires the component context available during setup to register payload/lifecycle hooks
useFetch only works with async/await at the module level
The Nitro server cannot process requests from client event handlers
